title: eucrypta micrantha
intro: Eucrypta micrantha, also known as small-flowered eucrypta, is a perennial herb in the family Boraginaceae, native to California and Baja California. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant. The health benefits of eucrypta micrantha include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues like irritable bowel syndrome. Eucrypta micrantha is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
